description: StatusCake is a website and infrastructure monitoring service for uptime, page speed, SSL, domains, and related checks. It lets users create and manage monitoring resources and alerting configurations for their sites and services.
summary: StatusCake exposes one public developer integration surface: a bearer-authenticated HTTP API at `https://api.statuscake.com/v1`, documented with a downloadable Swagger/OpenAPI YAML; its announced CLI is not yet available and no GraphQL or MCP surface was found.
